title: Minuartia stricta
taxonomy: Minuartia stricta is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a perennial plant that belongs to the genus Minuartia, which comprises small to medium-sized plants with simple leaves. The genus Minuartia is further classified under the order Caryophyllales and the class Magnoliopsida. The family Caryophyllaceae, to which Minuartia stricta belongs, is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the pink or carnation family. The classification of Minuartia stricta reflects its relationships with other plants in the angiosperm group.
